Table	Create Table
mlb_strikeout_props	CREATE TABLE `mlb_strikeout_props` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `gameId` int NOT NULL,
  `side` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
  `pitcherName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `pitcherHand` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `retrosheetId` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `mlbamId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `kProj` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `kLine` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `kPer9` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `kMedian` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `kP5` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `kP95` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bookLine` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bookOverOdds` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bookUnderOdds` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `pOver` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `pUnder` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `modelOverOdds` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `modelUnderOdds` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `edgeOver` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `edgeUnder` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `verdict` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bestEdge` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bestSide` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bestMlStr` varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `signalBreakdown` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `matchupRows` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `distribution` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `inningBreakdown` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `modelRunAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
